race.comment: COOL THE JETS (5) looks hard to beat this line-up. Has been knocking on the door, running on powerfully late at Oakbank to finish runner-up before finishing a close-up fourth at Donald last time. Looks hard to hold out. HERE COMES HOGAN (10) has the ability on best figures and can sneak a place. REMLAPS ANGEL (1) was safely held fresh but expected to improve sharply. This much easier, fitter, trip suits and aided by the claim. Given another chance. FLUX (4) resumes. Readied with two trials, winning the latest, and place both times he raced here so look for a good return.
